title: Stohun Altered BWT
description: A reinterpretation of the Better With Time mod in the style of modern minecraft. Featuring new textures, models, and animations.
body:
A reinterpretation of [Better With Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-with-time) in the style of modern Minecraft. Many of the assets from BWT are from the original Better Than Wolves mod which was released well over a decade ago. Minecraft's aesthetic has changed over this time. This resource pack is an attempt at bringing BWT more inline with the look of modern Minecraft.

currently includes:
- retextured The majority of blocks and items (see gallery)
- custom animations: gearbox, axle, stoked fire, and more
- retextured GUI containers

The pack is a work in progress. Content is likely to change and/or be added with new releases of BWT.
